Book Now:

CLICK: Book Now to login to your profile, make a new reservation or check an existing one. 

CALL: For the personal services of one of our Reservation Agents, at no extra fee, please call Helijet Reservations Centre at +1.800.665.4354

Ask us about the amenities included with your ticket; Free Parking, Drop Off Shuttle Service, Comfortable and Elevated Passenger Lounges offering complimentary wine/beer, Nespresso coffee, tea, drinks and snacks plus ask how Kids Fly Free!

Helijet Operates Regularly Scheduled Helicopter Flights From Our Comfortable Terminals At:

  • Vancouver Harbour Heliport
  • Vancouver International Airport (limited flights, weekdays only)
  • Victoria Harbour Heliport
  • Nanaimo Harbour Heliport

Printed Schedule: (pdf)
For Spring-Summer 2026 Schedule, effective May 6, 2026 – Click Here
Schedule is subject to change without notice.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit”
